rationale: No qualitative new events directly affecting Poland this cycle; US-Iran deal remains unresolved with conflicting signals, keeping energy price uncertainty alive but unchanged.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump says Sunday signing, Tehran disputes
top_events.summary: A confirmed Iran deal could lower global oil/gas prices, benefiting Polish consumers and industry. But conflicting signals mean no change from last cycle — continuation of uncertainty.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Beirut; accuses Hezbollah of ceasefire violation
top_events.summary: Renewed Middle East escalation could affect energy markets and EU security posture, but no direct impact on Poland's daily life — indirect and distant.

top_events.title: UK forces seize suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: Seizure of a Russian shadow fleet vessel signals tightening enforcement of sanctions, which Poland supports. Modest positive signal for energy sanctions effectiveness.
